lifecycle_definitions.evergreen: Current operational or architectural source of truth with no date-bound rollout dependency.
lifecycle_definitions.dated-active: Still-active feature, recovery, rollout, or follow-up doc that should move to archive when the tranche closes.
lifecycle_definitions.active-spec: Open design or policy spec that remains relevant to current implementation work.
lifecycle_definitions.support-index: Index or routing doc that helps agents find the canonical source material.
